===Pokémon Zensho===
[[File:Sabrina Zensho.png|thumb|200px|Sabrina in Pokémon Zensho]]
Sabrina appeared in [[PZ07]], where she accidentally teleported onto {{Zensho|Satoshi}} before leaving again. Having recently lost against {{Zensho|Shigeru}}, she was trying to save the [[Silph Co.]] from [[Team Rocket]]. When Satoshi entered the company's office building to do the same, he encountered Sabrina, who had befriended a {{pkmn2|talking}} Lapras owned by the company. Sabrina confessed to Satoshi about her insecurities, as she felt she was only winning battles because of her precognitive abilities, which couldn't help her against truly talented opponents like Shigeru. Satoshi cheered her up by telling her that battles are supposed to be surprising and exciting because no one knows what'll happen in them.

Using Sabrina's teleportation powers, she, Satoshi, and Lapras teleported to the top floor, where [[Giovanni]] was keeping the Silph Co. president hostage. While Sabrina kept Giovanni's underlings busy, Satoshi fought Giovanni with Lapras and was able to force him to retreat. After the Silph Co. had been saved, a grateful Sabrina gave Satoshi a {{badge|Marsh}}, intending to enjoy battles without relying on her precognitive abilities from now on.
